diffSummary: The bottom-rail gear now opens a Settings dialog (previously a no-op button with no onclick). New command-layer logout_account(account_id) stops the live session (session::SessionManager::remove, graceful listener shutdown) and deletes the persisted account + AES-GCM credential from SQLite (store::Db::delete_account, ON DELETE CASCADE); the shared keychain master key is left intact for the remaining accounts. Logout is a local forget — no server-side revocation, cached history is preserved — and no credential value ever crosses IPC (only a non-secret diagnostic is logged). Frontend adds: a theme store (light/dark/system, persisted to localStorage, applied via the .dark class and reacting to the system preference), SettingsDialog.svelte (Tài khoản / Giao diện / Dữ liệu / Giới thiệu tabs), session.settingsOpen + session.logoutAccount() (prunes the local bucket/rail and falls back to the QR gate when the last account is removed), the gear button wired to open the dialog, and theme.init() in the root layout.

checks.name: lint
checks.summary: cargo clippy -D warnings clean with logout_account + registration

checks.name: typecheck
checks.summary: svelte-check 0 errors / 0 warnings with SettingsDialog + theme store + session.logoutAccount

checks.name: frontend.build
checks.summary: vite production build succeeds with the settings UI (warning-free)

checks.name: tests
checks.summary: command-layer cargo tests pass (6 passed; logout_account boundary + import validation)

reviewers.name: advisor
reviewers.summary: Advisor pass: settings-panel honestly done; logout_account keeps the credential boundary intact, evidence fully attested, required reviewers green.

reviewers.name: security-reviewer
reviewers.summary: Security pass: non-secret accountId in, encrypted credential deleted via CASCADE, keychain master key preserved, no token logged/returned; local-forget residual accepted.

reviewers.name: architecture-reviewer
reviewers.summary: Architecture pass: logout_account sits at the command layer, depends only backward on session + store; ui reaches core solely via invoke.

knownRisks.description: logout_account forgets the account on this device (stops the listener, deletes the encrypted credential) but does not revoke the session server-side, so the Zalo bearer cookie may stay valid remotely until it expires; zca-rust exposes no verified logout endpoint.
knownRisks.mitigation: Credential is deleted locally so it cannot be reused from this install; gate true remote revocation behind a verified zca-rust endpoint with live-test evidence when one exists.
knownRisks.acceptanceReason: Personal-use client; local forget is the intended scope for this slice and matches the unofficial-API posture (no verified server-side logout).
